title: Build pre-compiled Rust binaries
description: Use GitHub Actions to build binaries for macOS (Intel/ARM), Linux (x86_64, ARM), Windows. Publish to GitHub Releases.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Precompiled Rust binaries require release target definitions and platform-specific builds; blocked pending release target list and CI/runners.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added tools/build_rust_release.py to build release binaries on the current platform (optionally with --target). Local build succeeded; binary at rust/target/release/taskulus. Cross-platform artifacts still require CI runners.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Continuing release pipeline verification: check latest CI/Release runs after last Windows socket cfg fix, validate Rust binaries and PyPI publish.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Release workflow still canceled due to Windows zip step failing: zip not available on windows-latest. Updated .github/workflows/release.yml to use Compress-Archive on Windows and keep zip for non-Windows. Need push after commit window is reopened.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Release run still canceled because macos-13 job canceled with no steps. Removed macos-13 (x86_64 macOS) from release matrix to unblock green releases; will need follow-up for Intel mac binaries.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Release run 21938672924 succeeded after removing macos-13 job; PyPI publish and Linux/macOS-arm/Windows binaries completed. Intel mac binary is still missing and needs a follow-up plan.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: macos-13 job keeps canceling with no steps; switching to macos-14 runner for both aarch64 and x86_64 targets to avoid cancellations and still produce Intel binary.

custom.beads_notes:
Plan: build local release binary via cargo build --release; record output and note remaining platforms for precompiled binaries.
Local build: cd rust && cargo build --release succeeded. Remaining platforms still pending for precompiled binaries.
Attempting to restore macos-13 (x86_64 macOS) release job now that Windows packaging is fixed and tskr rename landed.
Release run 21940725636 succeeded with Linux, Windows, macOS ARM and macOS Intel binaries (x86_64-apple-darwin built on macos-14).
